channel.title: Gilliano Agard | Cloud Security
channel.description: Recent content on Gilliano Agard | Cloud Security

item.title: Case Study: Zero Trust Edge Architecture
item.description: Deploying a highly secure, automated portfolio infrastructure using Azure and Cloudflare WAF.

item.title: Case Study: Zero-Touch DevSecOps Pipeline
item.description: Automated deployment of a containerized React application to Azure using Terraform, Docker and GitHub Actions.

item.title: Career Architecture
item.description: A structured, phased approach to advancing in a high-demand cloud security career.
